name: Neon Cyber
description: Cyberpunk aesthetic with vivid neon accents on pure dark backgrounds. High-energy, high-contrast, data-dense.

decorators.neon-card: Surface card with subtle border that glows cyan on hover, rounded 8px radius, shadow elevation with hover shadow transition
decorators.neon-input: Input field with border that transitions to cyan glow on focus, gentle focus ring with neon primary color
decorators.neon-glass: Frosted glassmorphic panel with backdrop blur(16px), semi-transparent surface background, subtle cyan-tinted border
decorators.neon-code: Monospace code block with surface-raised background, 3px left border in primary cyan, subtle rounded radius
decorators.neon-glow: Element with cyan box-shadow glow effect, pulsing animation on hover
decorators.neon-divider: Horizontal divider with gradient from transparent to primary to transparent
decorators.neon-badge: Small surface-raised background badge with rounded radius and subtle border

neon-card.description: Surface card with subtle border that glows cyan on hover, rounded 8px radius, shadow elevation with hover shadow transition
neon-card.intent: Use for content containers in cyberpunk-styled dashboards and data interfaces. The hover glow creates an electric interactive feel.

neon-input.description: Input field with border that transitions to cyan glow on focus, gentle focus ring with neon primary color
neon-input.intent: Use for form inputs in data-dense interfaces. The cyan focus glow provides clear, high-contrast interaction feedback.

neon-glass.description: Frosted glassmorphic panel with backdrop blur(16px), semi-transparent surface background, subtle cyan-tinted border
neon-glass.intent: Use for navigation bars and floating panels that need depth. The cyan-tinted border adds the neon signature to glass surfaces.

neon-code.description: Monospace code block with surface-raised background, 3px left border in primary cyan, subtle rounded radius
neon-code.intent: Use for code blocks and technical output displays. The cyan left border ties code to the neon aesthetic.

neon-glow.description: Element with cyan box-shadow glow effect, pulsing animation on hover
neon-glow.intent: Use to add the signature neon glow to CTAs and featured elements. The pulsing hover animation creates electric energy.

neon-divider.description: Horizontal divider with gradient from transparent to primary to transparent
neon-divider.intent: Use between content sections for a dramatic, glowing separation. The gradient creates a neon light-bar effect.

neon-badge.description: Small surface-raised background badge with rounded radius and subtle border
neon-badge.intent: Use for status labels, tags, and category indicators. Subtle styling ensures badges complement rather than compete with neon accents.
